description: §38.12.8 clean neg — a consumer imports the SAME channel `chat` twice from ONE source file (`chat` and `chat as alsoChat` from `./channels.scrml`). Both aliases reference the same wire-identity, so there is NO route collision and E-CHANNEL-008 stays silent. The delta from `channel/dup-name-cross-file` is single-source vs two-source.
rationale: §38.12.8: the collision is per DISTINCT source file — two aliases of the same imported channel share one wire-name from one file, which is not a conflict. E-CHANNEL-008 fires only when the same `name=` arrives from two different sources.
